svg.text: 7 active lines | shared upstream block -> line feed -> Glass2 modules -> output collection
Y = 28 to 32 | 7 Warp Cells S buffers -> 2 TU Warp Cells -> central hub
Y = 18 to 26 | 7 identical modules, each = 1 Support + 10 Glass2 in a 5 x 2 grid
Y = 12 to 16 | each line root = TU AM Core + TU QA Unit + WCell Support XS
Y = 0 to 10 | smelters, 10 producer banks of Electronics2, AM/QA outputs, and missing support-input layers
The old 3 x 3 bank is wrong.
S2-S5: each support adds CaReinfCop + Cu-Ag feeds
Banks sit about 3 m west of the output/support stack.
Feeder TUs sit about 2.5 m east.
QA S1 direct: QCores XS1, Bas LED XS1, Polycalcite XS7, Polycarb S6B XS1, Polysulfide XS9
S2: Polycarb S2A | Polycalc XS5 | Bas LED S7 | Polysulf XS4
S3: Polycarb S3B | Polycalc XS3 | Bas LED S8 | Polysulf XS5
S4: Polycarb S4A | Polycalc XS6 | Bas LED S6 | Polysulf XS5
S5: Polycarb S4B | Polycalc XS4 | Bas LED S7 | Polysulf XS6
